For Digimon Card Game Digimon cards
{{DCGD
|series= Series name
|sn= Card number (e.g. P-001)
|prev= previous (whole number e.g. 1-001)
|next= next (whole number e.g. 1-003)
|col= card colour (r=red, b=blue, y=yellow, g=green, w=white, p=purple, bk=black)
|evocol= evolution colour (r=red, b=blue, y=yellow, g=green, w=white, p=purple, bk=black, rb=rainbow)
|lv= card level
|cdtype= digitama card or digimon card if card level is "-"
|dp= DP
|entry= play cost
|evocost= evolution cost
|evolv= evolution level (card to evolve from)
|evoapp= evolution from appmon grade (type yes)
|i= illustrator
|n= Digimon name
|n2= Digimon's pagename
|ace= ACE card (if this is ACE card, type yes)
|r= rarity
|level= evolution level of digimon (e.g. Child, Ultimate; if this card is appmon, use grade)
|grade= evolution grade of appmon (e.g. Standard, Super)
|att= attribute
|type= type (if this card is appmon, use app)
|app= app
|grp = group (e.g. Four Great Dragons)
|grp2 = group 2 (e.g. X-Antibody)
|grp3 = group 3 (e.g. Liberator)
|e1= effect 1
|e2= effect 2
|e3= effect 3
|e1j= effect 1 jp text
|link= Has ? (yes/no)
|lb0= link base effect 0 (the actual  effect itself)
|lb1= link base effect 1 (the inheritable)
|lb0j= link base effect 0 jp text
|lbdp= the DP granted upon linking this card
|ea= ACE effect
|eaj= ACE effect jp text
|eb1= evolution base effect 1
|eb2= evolution base effect 2
|eb3= evolution base effect 3
|eb1j= evolution base effect 1 jp text
|pr=released with (for promo cards)
|prj=released with (jp)
|notes=notes (errata, etc.)
}}
